---
title: "TRSE units: TIM"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE
---

# TIM

These paths are relative to `units/TIM/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `misc`
- `system/ascii`
- `system/file`
- `system/graphics`
- `system/screen`
- `system/system`
- `system/tiles`
- `system/z80cpm`
- `unittests/common`
